name: MCP Server Manager
description: Installs and configures Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers for AI-assisted development inside devcontainers

servers.description: Comma-separated list of MCP servers to install (github, playwright, context7, vercel, supabase, fetch, sequentialthinking, memory, sqlite)

configPath.description: Path to write the MCP server configuration JSON, or 'auto' for ~/.mcp/mcp-servers.json

startServers.description: Generate a startup script that launches configured MCP servers in the background
